rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"workflow_run trigger's workflows:[...] filter matches workflow NAME (title), not filename — a workflow named 'Test CI' won't match workflows:['CI']","scope":"github-actions"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Removed workflows:[...] from workflow_run trigger; the job-level if: condition already gates on conclusion=='failure' && event=='pull_request', making the workflow-name filter redundant and overly str","scope":".github/workflows/kody.yml"}]}
